title: SmithingUpgraders+
description: New Smithing Templates to craft other vanilla armor and tools. Ideal for a more challenging experience. ✨
body:
![title](https://i.imgur.com/OzKozTw.png)

## 📚 | ABOUT
• Making armor or tools with any other ore preceding the Netherite Ore is very easy for some people in Minecraft vanilla, especially with the new updates. That’s the reason why I created this mod, modified the way armor and tools are crafted, and made the process a little more difficult by adding new Smithing Templates for classic armor.

![gif-trade1](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExc3dlMWFwc2N2MGs1cGhpa2c0OW5kMHpyamZ3NTN6eDZ3cXJxM3k1eSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/ixVeaLGOlIyuRfGiJP/giphy.gif)

![gif-armor1](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExaHc2ZmNlbXN6bGRsdWd1eDQ0b2Z4enRnOTg2ZXkycG9qNmE2dTZ1ZyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/gd7gaOo01IWxvxncm6/giphy.gif)

## 🔎 | TUTORIAL
### ![recipe1-image](https://i.imgur.com/kgu7ZeP.png) ![recipe2-image](https://i.imgur.com/qRlshsA.png) ![recipe3-image](https://i.imgur.com/nH7xzu3.png)

**⤷** With a novice Toolsmith villager, you can exchange a chestplate and some emeralds for a Smithing Template. Remember that you don’t need to level up the villager, just break his workbench (the Smithing Table) until the desired Smithing Template appears.

### ![dupe1](https://i.imgur.com/5UANKle.png) ![dupe2](https://i.imgur.com/yO2HJl2.png) ![dupe3](https://i.imgur.com/OEedAHM.png)
**⤷** Smithing Templates dupe.

### ![capacete1](https://i.imgur.com/vctxLdF.png) ![capacete2](https://i.imgur.com/xU4Y81n.png) ![capacete3](https://i.imgur.com/ZQO8kdf.png)
### ![peitoral1](https://i.imgur.com/CtXJOPk.png) ![peitoral2](https://i.imgur.com/l9of2ki.png) ![capacete3](https://i.imgur.com/tYbac1j.png)
### ![calças1](https://i.imgur.com/QmZO1HB.png) ![calças2](https://i.imgur.com/c9HFt0g.png) ![calças3](https://i.imgur.com/SqU9HHg.png)
### ![botas1](https://i.imgur.com/NLHdRMT.png) ![botas2](https://i.imgur.com/2QHcPlE.png) ![botas3](https://i.imgur.com/hZ4Ogsy.png)

**⤷** The armor crafting system of the Crafting Table has been completely removed. Now you will have to craft your armor using the Smithing Table and the new Smithing Templates.

### ![picareta1](https://i.imgur.com/dMO9QAw.png) ![picareta2](https://i.imgur.com/qcQzGKm.png) ![picareta3](https://i.imgur.com/bRY6apU.png)

### OBS: The axes, swords, shovels, and hoes also follow the same pattern. 📌

**⤷** Just like the armor, you will also have to craft the tools using the Smithing Table and the Smithing Templates.

## 🌟 | CREDITS
• Mod created by t2rtle (ARR) ©️ 

• Resource pack used in the GIF: [**BetterHotbar+**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/betterhotbar+).

## 📦 | MODPACKS
• You may freely use this mod in any modpack, as long as the download remains hosted within the Modrinth ecosystem.

## 📮 | QUESTIONS
 • 01. Do you want to create Forge versions for your mod? 
 > R: I have no plans to create Forge versions of SmithingUpgraders+ at the moment.
 
• 02. Can I distribute your mod? 
> R: **No**. Do not distribute my mods anywhere.
